reasons: Kagura can remove debuffs and reposition, making Cyclops's single-target lock less reliable.
Her umbrella range lets her punish Cyclops without always staying inside his best close-range skill zone.

proof.summary: Cyclops wants to lock and chase a target, while Kagura can cleanse debuffs, dash, and reset spacing before counter-poking.
worksBestWhen: Kagura keeps Rasho Umbrella Flee available for Cyclops's lockdown timing.
Kagura pokes before Cyclops gets close enough for repeated skill hits.
failureCases: Cyclops catches Kagura after her umbrella mobility is unavailable.

reasons: Lancelot can use invulnerable or untargetable windows to dodge Cyclops's important skill timing.
He can punish Cyclops's short effective range with burst after cooldowns are committed.

proof.summary: Cyclops needs skill hits to maintain tempo, while Lancelot can dodge through key windows and burst Cyclops before the sustained cycle wins.
worksBestWhen: Lancelot times Thorned Rose or Phantom Execution into Cyclops's lockdown or burst window.
Lancelot engages after Cyclops spends Planets Attack or ultimate.
failureCases: Lancelot mistimes immunity and gets immobilized.
Cyclops stays protected behind tank control.

reasons: Saber can punish Cyclops before Cyclops gets repeated skill rotations.
Targeted airborne burst is effective when Cyclops is isolated or lacks defensive item timing.

proof.summary: Cyclops wants a longer chase where cooldown reduction matters, while Saber compresses the fight into a single burst window.
worksBestWhen: Saber catches Cyclops away from tank peel.
Saber has enough burst to finish before Cyclops can sustain or kite.
failureCases: Saber dives while Cyclops's team is ready to counter-engage.

reasons: Lolita can protect teammates from part of Cyclops's projectile pressure.
She gives the team a safer formation against Cyclops's chase attempts.

proof.summary: Cyclops relies on skill pressure to start cooldown cycling, while Lolita can shield allies from ranged projectile pressure and disrupt his clean target access.
worksBestWhen: Lolita positions between Cyclops and the target he wants to chase.
The team respects Lolita's shield angle.
failureCases: Cyclops waits out the shield before using lockdown.

reasons: Natalia can pressure Cyclops before he joins a fight.
Her threat forces Cyclops to play closer to teammates, reducing his freedom to chase.

proof.summary: Cyclops becomes dangerous when he can freely chase with skills, while Natalia punishes isolated rotations and forces safer positioning.
worksBestWhen: Natalia tracks Cyclops between mid lane, jungle, and side rotations.
Cyclops has no defensive item or nearby peel.
failureCases: Natalia is revealed before entering burst range.
